result: **Sprint-day infrastructure log:** 15 services (user-profile-service, payment-gateway, billing-worker, auth-service, ingest-api, search-indexer, export-pipeline, notification-daemon, scheduler-core, webhook-relay, session-manager, cache-warmer, metrics-collector, audit-logger, report-builder) across 6 environments (QA cluster, canary, production, staging, dev sandbox, blue/green pools).
